title: Junior Instructional Designer at Narayana Group Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Narayana Group Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Narayana Group Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Narayana Group Advisory Limited:
Narayana Group Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
